name: Philippine Chamber of Commerce and Industry
description: The premier business network connecting Filipino entrepreneurs, professionals, and enterprises across the globe. Building bridges between Philippine talent, international markets, and strategic partnerships.
execution_order: 1. CREATE_TABLES     -- Run SQL to create all {prefix}_* tables in PostgreSQL
2. SEED_REGIONS      -- Insert regions from config.regions into {prefix}_regions
3. GENERATE_LANDING  -- Render landing page HTML from template + config to public/chamber/{slug}/
4. GENERATE_DASHBOARD-- Render dashboard SPA from template + config to public/chamber/{slug}/dashboard/
5. MOUNT_ROUTES      -- Register chamber routes in src/app.js at /chamber/{slug}/api
7. VERIFY_LOCAL      -- Hit /chamber/{slug}/api/health and confirm all modules respond
9. GIT_PUSH          -- git push origin main (triggers Render deploy)
10. VERIFY_PRODUCTION -- Wait 90s, then curl production health endpoint
11. REPORT            -- Output summary: URL, admin credentials, table count, module status
